item.title: Dragon Chest Build Iron and Woodworking
item.description: A detailed build combining forged iron and woodworking to create a dragon-themed chest. Craftsmanship, design, and assembly bring the unique piece to life.

media:content.media:title: Dragon Chest Build Iron and Woodworking
media:content.media:description: A detailed build combining forged iron and woodworking to create a dragon-themed chest. Craftsmanship, design, and assembly bring the unique piece to life.

item.title: Forging Tools for Camping Trip Essentials
item.description: Blacksmithing tools prepared for a camping trip, showing practical forging techniques and a portable setup for outdoor craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging Tools for Camping Trip Essentials
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing tools prepared for a camping trip, showing practical forging techniques and a portable setup for outdoor craftsmanship.

item.title: Hand-Forged Shepherd’s Axe Completed
item.description: A blacksmith completes a traditional shepherd’s axe, showcasing forging, shaping, and finishing techniques for a durable handmade tool.

media:content.media:title: Hand-Forged Shepherd’s Axe Completed
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith completes a traditional shepherd’s axe, showcasing forging, shaping, and finishing techniques for a durable handmade tool.

item.title: Forged Square Knot Hook Made by Hand
item.description: A handcrafted square knot hook is forged and shaped using traditional blacksmithing techniques, highlighting precision and detailed metalworking skill.

media:content.media:title: Forged Square Knot Hook Made by Hand
media:content.media:description: A handcrafted square knot hook is forged and shaped using traditional blacksmithing techniques, highlighting precision and detailed metalworking skill.

item.title: Tips for Stronger Blind Rivet Installation
item.description: Learn practical tips for installing blind rivets more securely, improving strength, alignment, and overall fastening results in metalworking and repair projects.

media:content.media:title: Tips for Stronger Blind Rivet Installation
media:content.media:description: Learn practical tips for installing blind rivets more securely, improving strength, alignment, and overall fastening results in metalworking and repair projects.

item.title: Building a Strong Metal Clamp Demo
item.description: A demonstration of forging a durable metal clamp, focusing on strength, fit, and practical blacksmithing techniques for reliable workshop tools.

media:content.media:title: Building a Strong Metal Clamp Demo
media:content.media:description: A demonstration of forging a durable metal clamp, focusing on strength, fit, and practical blacksmithing techniques for reliable workshop tools.

item.title: Forging a Reverse Twist in Metal
item.description: A blacksmith demonstrates how to forge a reverse twist, showing heating, shaping, and controlled hammering techniques for decorative metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Reverse Twist in Metal
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith demonstrates how to forge a reverse twist, showing heating, shaping, and controlled hammering techniques for decorative metalwork.

item.title: Restoring Old Chisels for New Use
item.description: Old chisels are repaired and reshaped, showing restoration techniques that bring worn tools back to life for practical and long-lasting use in the workshop.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Chisels for New Use
media:content.media:description: Old chisels are repaired and reshaped, showing restoration techniques that bring worn tools back to life for practical and long-lasting use in the workshop.

item.title: Forging a Red Licorice Twist in Iron
item.description: A decorative iron twist is forged with tight, flowing curves, showcasing controlled heat and hammering techniques for creative blacksmithing designs.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Red Licorice Twist in Iron
media:content.media:description: A decorative iron twist is forged with tight, flowing curves, showcasing controlled heat and hammering techniques for creative blacksmithing designs.

item.title: Using an Anvil Hardy Hole Efficiently
item.description: Learn practical ways to use an anvil hardy hole for cutting, shaping, and supporting metalwork, improving efficiency in blacksmithing projects.

media:content.media:title: Using an Anvil Hardy Hole Efficiently
media:content.media:description: Learn practical ways to use an anvil hardy hole for cutting, shaping, and supporting metalwork, improving efficiency in blacksmithing projects.

item.title: Forging a Rustic Handmade Screwdriver
item.description: A blacksmith forges a rustic screwdriver from raw steel, showing shaping, hardening, and finishing techniques for a functional handmade tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Rustic Handmade Screwdriver
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith forges a rustic screwdriver from raw steel, showing shaping, hardening, and finishing techniques for a functional handmade tool.

item.title: Forging a Tenon Spring Die Tool
item.description: A blacksmith creates a tenon spring die, demonstrating forging, shaping, and precision fitting techniques for functional shop tooling.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Tenon Spring Die Tool
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith creates a tenon spring die, demonstrating forging, shaping, and precision fitting techniques for functional shop tooling.
